name: Chicken in Lemon Coriander Broth
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into fine strips
8 ounces new red potatoes, scrubbed clean and cut into 1-inch dice
1/4 cup fresh cilantro leaves, left whole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, heat the minced garlic over low heat until fragrant.
2. Add the chicken broth and water to the pot with the garlic. Bring to a simmer.
3. Add the potatoes to the pot and cover. Simmer for 10 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
4. Add the chicken strips, lemon zest, and gently stir to combine. Cover and continue simmering for 5 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
5. Remove the pot from heat. Stir in the cilantro leaves and lemon juice.
6. Sprinkle each portion with Parmesan cheese. Serve immediately.
Yield: 2 servings
